title: Teltonika RUT951 PoE+ Industrial Cellular Router with eSIM
description: Building on the success of our bestseller 4G router, this enhanced version now features versatile Power over Ethernet (PoE+) capability. This robust router boasts dual SIM and eSIM, reliable Wi-Fi, and four PoE+ Ethernet ports. Powered by RutOS and designed for diverse IoT deployments, the RUT951 PoE+ ensures seamless data transmission and simplifies power management for your connected IoT solutions CONNECTIVITY: 4G LTE (Cat 4), 3G, 2G DUAL SIM & eSIM: With auto failover, backup WAN and other switching scenarios PoE+: Total power budget of 90W WI-FI: Wireless Access Point with Hotspot functionality Device Power supply 48V, 1.3A, 62.4W (2) Mobile antennas (swivel, SMA male) (2) Wi-Fi antennas (swivel, RP-SMA male) Ethernet cable (1.5 m) SIM Adapter kit QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz, LTE, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz, (40) 2300 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps RF connectors (2) RSMA female, (2) SMA female LAN speed (3) 10/100Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 3 PoE budget [W] 90 Max. power consumption [W] 7 Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 287 Width [mm] 110 Height [mm] 50 Depth [mm] 100 Hardware CPU frequency [MHz] 580 RAM [MB] 128
